name: Baked Vegetable Gumbo Creole
recipeIngredient: Bell peppers, in strips (2 pk, 10 oz each)
Corn kernels from 8 ears fresh corn
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook fresh okra briefly in boiling salted water; drain.
2. Blanch celery in boiling salted water.
3. Add bell peppers and lima beans, cooking until just tender. During the last 30 seconds, add corn (do not overcook), then drain all vegetables.
4. Grease a large baking dish with butter and sprinkle with bread crumbs.
5. Layer the corn-bean mixture and okra in the dish.
6. Combine onion, tomatoes, and basil; spread this layer over the bottom layer in the dish.
7. Sprinkle chiles and season with salt and pepper.
8. Dot with additional butter and sprinkle with bread crumbs.
9. Repeat layering until the casserole is filled.
10. Top with a layer of okra that has been dipped in crumbs and lightly sautéed in butter; sprinkle evenly with shredded cheese if desired.
11. Bake uncovered at 300°F for 1 hour.
Note: This can be baked in the morning and reheated slowly before serving. It tastes even better the second day.
